name: 种菜游戏
description: 种菜模拟游戏，选择种子种植，浇水、施肥、除草帮助植物生长，收获结果可保存记录，支持定时任务，只有一个存档
description_en: Farming simulation game. Plant seeds, water, fertilize and weed to help plants grow. Save harvest records. Supports scheduled tasks. Single save slot

permissions.name: android.permission.MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
permissions.desc: 用于保存游戏进度和收获记录
permissions.desc_en: Save game progress and harvest records

apis.name: startGame
apis.desc: 开始新的种菜游戏（如已有存档将被覆盖），初始化空田地
apis.desc_en: Start a new farming game (overwrites existing save). Initialize empty farm plots

apis.name: enterGame
apis.desc: 进入已有的种菜游戏（加载存档），如无存档则自动创建新游戏
apis.desc_en: Enter existing farming game (load save). Auto-creates new game if no save exists

apis.name: plant
apis.desc: 在指定地块种植作物，可选种子类型：tomato/carrot/cabbage/corn/watermelon/strawberry
apis.desc_en: Plant a crop on the specified plot. Seed types: tomato/carrot/cabbage/corn/watermelon/strawberry

apis.name: water
apis.desc: 给指定地块浇水，促进植物生长
apis.desc_en: Water the specified plot to promote growth

apis.name: fertilize
apis.desc: 给指定地块施肥，加速植物生长
apis.desc_en: Fertilize the specified plot to accelerate growth

apis.name: weed
apis.desc: 给指定地块除草，防止杂草影响植物生长
apis.desc_en: Weed the specified plot to prevent weeds from affecting growth

apis.name: harvest
apis.desc: 收获指定地块的成熟作物，记录到收获历史
apis.desc_en: Harvest mature crop from the specified plot. Records to harvest history

apis.name: getState
apis.desc: 获取当前游戏状态，包括所有地块、作物状态、收获记录等
apis.desc_en: Get current game state including all plots, crop status, harvest records

apis.name: saveGame
apis.desc: 手动保存当前游戏进度
